description: 2x2 matrix grid mapping lube weight (heavy 205g0 vs light 3203) against application location (stem legs vs housing rails and spring), with color-coded quadrant outcomes for tactile switches.
section_anchor: Tactile switches — what not to do

data_sources.section: Tactile switches — what not to do
data_sources.claim: Lubing the stem legs with heavy lube like 205g0 destroys the tactile bump making the switch feel linear; light lube on rails and spring is standard practice with no trade-offs
